---
title: "People"
toc: false
---

**Co-Chairs:**

  * Daniel Sabanes Bove (RCONIS)

  * Ya Wang (Gilead)

  * Alessandro Gasparini (GSK)

```{r load_read_members_script}
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
path <- getwd()
source(file = paste(path, "/utils/read_members.R", sep = ""))
```

<br/>

**Members:**

```{r active}
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
#| results: "asis"
read.members("SWE_WG_Member")
```

<br/>

**Alumni:**

```{r alumni}
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
#| results: "asis"
read.members("SWE_WG_Alumni")
```
